description:
Move the pure FFI implementations (fz_alloc_*, fz_arith_*, fz_cmp_*, fz_value_eq, render_*, eq_*, etc.) from ir_codegen.rs to a new src/ir_runtime.rs. ir_codegen continues to reference them by name in symbol declarations; no semantic change.

## Acceptance

- cargo test green (419 unit tests + fixture matrix).
- ir_codegen.rs shrinks by ~600 lines.
- ir_runtime.rs holds the FFI; symbol-binding list in compile() updated to `crate::ir_runtime::fz_*`.
title: Extract runtime FFI fns from ir_codegen.rs into ir_runtime.rs
